# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch:
  snapshot:
    local:
      snapshots_location: /data/snapshots

    cloud:
      aws:
        s3:
          bucket: my-es-backups
          region: us-west-2
          role_arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/elasticsearch-s3-access
          rotate_age: 7d
        endpoint: your-elastic-endpoint.us-west-2.aws.found.io
        ssl_certificate: path/to/certificate.pem
        ssl_key: path/to/private-key.pem

    schedule:
      cron: "0 5 * * *"

indices:
  - alias: my-index
    snapshot:
      name: my-index-snapshot
      schedule: "@cron*/5 * * * *"
      include_global_state: true

repositories:
  s3:
    type: s3
    bucket: ${aws_s3.my-es-backups.bucket}
    region: ${aws_s3.my-es-backups.region}
    role_arn: ${elasticsearch.cloud.aws.s3.role_arn}
    rotate_age: ${elasticsearch.cloud.aws.s3.rotate_age}

restore_excluded_indices: []
